rationale: This is a food-themed word/crossword satisfaction hook — fundamentally mismatched to Mob Control's aim-shoot-multiplier-army loop; there's no honest way to bridge a "spell DONUT" puzzle into cannon/mob gameplay without misleading creative that will tank D1 retention and inflate refunds. Palette (browns/yellows/greens) and casual word-game audience (skews older/female) also conflict with the purple/cyan energetic palette and 18-35 male-skewing action audience. Recommend skipping; if testing satisfaction hooks, source ones built around crowd-collision or gate-multiplier ASMR instead.
